_publications._publicationTitle: A platform for rapid patient-derived cutaneous neurofibroma organoid establishment and screening

basicInfo.description: Patient-derived cNF organoid from 54-year-old female NF1 patient; established from back/posterior trunk cNF by collagenase IV dissociation and reconstitution in Mammocult:Matrigel (3:4) ring format; NF1 deletion variant on chr17 identified by WGS
basicInfo.clinicalData: Age at surgery: 54; Sex: Female; cNF location: back, posterior trunk including neck and shoulders; Single tumors: 7; Pooled tumors: 12; NF1 germline variant: deletion chr17:31,234,616-31,238,587 (3,971 bp)
validationMethods: IHC (S100, CD34, CD56, CD117/c-Kit, NGFR, SOX2, SOX10, PanCytokeratin)
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Department of Orthopaedic Surgery, David Geffen School of Medicine, UCLA
